name: security
trigger_condition: Task involves secrets, auth, deletion, quarantine, or approval
description: Security skills: secret handling (classification, storage, masking), quarantine policy (no-delete), approval gates (request, review, approve), snapshot/rollback flow, audit logging, permission checks, secrets detection in code and output.
expected_output: Secure code with proper secret handling and audit trail
known_limitations: Quarantine only moves files; does not encrypt; approval gates require human reviewer
